inputs.exception_request: Allow the deploy worker to run without sandbox for one release to debug a native crash.
inputs.policy: All workers run sandboxed; sandbox bypass requires a time-boxed, approved exception.

expected_outputs.exception_record: Sandbox bypass granted to the deploy worker until 2026-07-05, owner RNT56, with isolated-host and syscall-audit controls; operator approved.

notes: Grants a time-boxed sandbox bypass with owner, expiry, risk, controls, and explicit approval.
